source_pr.title: ddl, tools, util: migrate pingcap check to testify.
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #29111 ,close #29108 ,close #29104 ,close #29109 ,close #29114 ,close #28639 ,close #28638 ,close #28631,close #28630 

Problem Summary: migrate pingcap check to testify.

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: // this test file include some test that will cause data race, mainly because restartWorkers modify d.ctx
failure_signature: // this test file include some test that will cause data race, mainly because restartWorkers modify d.ctx
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness risk here is driven by legacy test infrastructure: this change migrates a large set of DDL/tools/util tests from pingcap check (gocheck) to testify, which is a common stabilization step when the old framework/suite patterns contribute to brittle or flaky tests.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy pingcap check (gocheck) tests to testify (Go testing) to improve test stability.

evidence: evidence: // this test file include some test that will cause data race, mainly because restartWorkers modify d.ctx

files: ddl/column_change_test.go, ddl/column_test.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/fail_test.go, ddl/index_change_test.go, ddl/placement_policy_ddl_test.go, ddl/reorg_test.go, ddl/restart_test.go, ddl/schema_test.go, ddl/stat_test.go, ddl/util_test.go, tools/check/check_testSuite.sh, util/testutil/testutil.go
